top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN constructors con ON res.constructorId = con.constructorId
WHERE con.name = 'Renault';

SELECT DISTINCT c.name AS circuit_name
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN constructors co ON r.raceId = (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM results 
    WHERE constructorId = co.constructorId
)
WHERE co.name = 'Renault';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN constructors con ON res.constructorId = con.constructorId
WHERE con.name = 'Renault';
